zh.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Jr.是Michael Franks Sr和Maria Mary Miller Mueller的兒子，於1745年出生在法國巴-爾斯特拉斯布格。他於大約1762年與Elizabeth Livengood結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1814年2月3日在美國賓夕法尼亞州法也特赫爾曼 堂史普享年69歲，埋葬在美國賓夕法尼亞州法也特赫爾曼 堂史普麥可萊藍托亞可也斯 艾萬利卡爾 盧黑朗 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Jr.是Michael Franks Sr和Maria Mary Miller Mueller的儿子，于1745年出生在法国巴-爾斯特拉斯布格。他于大约1762年与Elizabeth Livengood结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1814年2月3日在美国宾夕法尼亚州法也特赫爾曼 堂史普享年69岁，埋葬在美国宾夕法尼亚州法也特赫爾曼 堂史普麥可萊藍托亞可也斯 艾萬利卡爾 盧黑朗 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Franks
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from   Frank  .
English: perhaps sometimes a variant of Frankish, an ethnic name from Middle English frankys ‘French, Frenchman’ (Old English frencisc), for someone from France.

variants.name: Frank
meanings: German, Dutch, Scandinavian, Slovenian, Croatian, Czech, Slovak, Polish, Hungarian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): ethnic or habitational name for someone from Franconia (German Franken), a region of southwestern Germany so called from its early settlement by the Franks, an ancient Germanic people who inhabited the lands around the River Rhine in Roman times. In the 6th–9th centuries, under leaders such as Clovis I (c. 466–511) and Charlemagne (742–814), the Franks established a substantial empire in western Europe, from which the country of France takes its name.

English (of Norman origin), Dutch, and German: from the personal name Frank (Norman French Franco, ancient Germanic Franko), in origin an ethnic name for a Frank, or from German Franke ‘Frank(ish), Franconian’ (compare 1 above). This also came to be used as an adjective meaning ‘free, open-hearted, generous’ (Middle English and Old French franc ‘free’, i.e. not a serf or slave), deriving from the fact that in Frankish Gaul only people of Frankish race enjoyed the status of fully free men. As a surname of German origin it is also found (in both possible meanings; see 1 above) in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Franc and Franck .

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

historicEvents.description: Oldest grave seen in the memorials list.
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Treaty of Alliance with American Colonies
historicEvents.description: After the battle of Saratoga France realized that America might be worth backing. They formed an alliance with the colonies and sent naval fleets to help with the war.

historicEvents.title: A Free America
historicEvents.description: The Revolutionary War ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris which gave the new nation boundries on which they could expand and trade with other countries without any problems.

historicEvents.title: Treaty of Paris is Signed
historicEvents.description: While Benjamin Franklin was the ambassador to France he negotiated with the French during the war to keep them on the American side. At the same time the Treaty of Paris was established.

historicEvents.title: Movement to Washington D.C.
historicEvents.description: While the growth of the new nation was exponential, the United States didn’t have permanent location to house the Government. The First capital was temporary in New York City but by the second term of George Washington the Capital moved to Philadelphia for the following 10 years. Ultimately during the Presidency of John Adams, the Capital found a permanent home in the District of Columbia.

historicEvents.title: First Empire
historicEvents.description: When the French Revolution ended it started the First Empire or the reign of the Emperors. This included Napoleon I twice and Louis XVIII (King). The First Empire was in control during the Napoleonic Wars.

en.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Jr. was born in 1745, in Strasbourg, Bas-Rhin, France as the son of Michael Franks Sr and Maria Mary Miller Mueller. He married Elizabeth Livengood about 1762. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 3 February 1814, in German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 69, and was buried in Jacob's Evangelical Lutheran Cemetery, McClellandtown, German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, United States.

historicEvents.description: Les limites du Bas-Rhin furent modifiées à de nombreuses reprises : en 1793, il absorba les territoires suivants, nouvellement annexés par la France : le comté de Sarrewerden (Bouquenom et Sarrewerden étaient rattachés à la Moselle de 1790 à 1793), le comté de Drulingen, la seigneurie de Diemeringen, la seigneurie d'Asswiller, domaine de la famille de Steinkallenfels, plusieurs communes du Palatinat; en 1795 la région de Schirmeck - qui ne parlait pas l'alsacien - lui fut retirée (district de Sélestat) et rattachée aux Vosges (district de Senones) ; en 1808, des territoires à l'est du Rhin lui furent rattachés, en particulier la ville de Kehl ; en 1814, à la suite du premier traité de Paris, il gagna des territoires au nord de la Lauter, provenant de l'ancien département du Mont-Tonnerre, notamment la ville de Landau, mais il perdit tous les territoires à l'est du Rhin;

fr.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Jr. est né en 1745, à Strasbourg, Bas-Rhin, France, fils de Michael Franks Sr et Maria Mary Miller Mueller. Il a épousé Elizabeth Livengood environ 1762. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 3 février 1814, à German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Jacob's Evangelical Lutheran Cemetery, McClellandtown, German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Jr. wurde 1745 in Straßburg, Bas-Rhin, Frankreich, als Sohn von Michael Franks Sr und Maria Mary Miller Mueller geboren. Er hat um 1762 Elizabeth Livengood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Februar 1814 im Alter von 69 Jahren in German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Jacob's Evangelical Lutheran Cemetery, McClellandtown, German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Jr. è nato il nel 1745 nel Strasbourg, Bas-Rhin, Francia come figlio di Michael Franks Sr e Maria Mary Miller Mueller. Lui sposato Elizabeth Livengood circa 1762. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 3 febbraio 1814, nel German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Jacob's Evangelical Lutheran Cemetery, McClellandtown, German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Jr.は1745年にフランスバス-ルヒンストラスボウルグでMichael Franks SrとMaria Mary Miller Muellerの息子として生まれた。約1762年にElizabeth Livengoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1814年2月3日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ファイエットジャーマン トウンシュイップで69歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ファイエットジャーマン トウンシュイップマククレラントウンジャコブ'ス エヴァンジェリカル ルスエラン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Jr.(은)는 1745년 프랑스 바스-히 스트라스보우르그에서 Michael Franks Sr(와)과 Maria Mary Miller Mueller의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1762년 Elizabeth Livengood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1814년 2월 3일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 파예트 그먼 타운시프에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 펜실베이니아 주 파예트 그먼 타운시프 맥클렐랜타운 재컵'스 이반그리칼 루더란 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Jr. nasceu em 1745, em Strasbourg, Bas-Rhin, França filho de Michael Franks Sr e Maria Mary Miller Mueller. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Livengood aproximadamente 1762. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1814, em German Township, Fayette, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Jacob's Evangelical Lutheran Cemetery, McClellandtown, German Township, Fayette, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Jr. родился в 1745 г. в местности страсбург, бас-рин, Франция. Его родителей звали Michael Franks Sr и Maria Mary Miller Mueller. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Livengood около 1762 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 3 февраля 1814 г. в местности джирман тоуншип, феиетт, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности джакоб'с эвангеликаль лутиран кеметири, макклелландтоун, джирман тоуншип, феиетт, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Michael Franks Jr. nació en 1745, en Strasbourg, Bas-Rhin, Francia como hijo de Michael Franks Sr y Maria Mary Miller Mueller. Se casó con Elizabeth Livengood aproximadamente 1762. Murió el 3 de febrero de 1814, en German Township, Fayette, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Jacob's Evangelical Lutheran Cemetery, McClellandtown, German Township, Fayette, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos.
